oxiracetam.dose_note: Note: This is for the course over a 24 hour period. 2-3x times daily, such as 400mg-800mg/3x day.
oxiracetam.name: oxiracetam

properties.note: The doses listed are for over the course of a 24 hour period. 2-3x daily, such as 400-800mg three times a day.
properties.summary: Oxiracetam is a racetam nootropic, having a hydroxyl group being the only difference between this and piracetam. It used as a nootropic, namely for increased cognitive function. It is typically used two to three times a day. This substance is typically taken with choline and is reported to cause headaches without the addition of it.
